Dear Hiring Team,

I'm applying for the Backend Software Engineer role at Grab. I am impressed by how Grab uses real-time data to optimize map services for millions of users. My background in building scalable systems and handling complex data scrapers aligns well with your mission to improve driver-partner efficiency.

I currently develop core features in C++ and JavaScript at EXAIL Robotics, where I maintain high-quality code for an eye-tracking system. On the side, I built ValoFenua, a full-stack platform that manages a daily scraper of 1,300 listings with a PostgreSQL backend. I also redesigned the installation process at my current company. It used to take about 2 days. Now it takes 2 hours and anyone on the team can run it. That's an 85% reduction in deployment time, showing my focus on efficiency and site reliability.

I'm finishing my M.S. in Information Systems Engineering in 2026. I look forward to the possibility of helping Grab scale its core map services and create economic empowerment across Southeast Asia.
